title: ardisia tahanica
intro: Ardisia tahanica, also known as the Malaysian ardisia, is a plant species in the family Primulaceae, native to Malaysia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which are used to treat various health issues due to their antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ardisia tahanica include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat digestive issues. In traditional medicine, the roots are often prepared as a decoction or infused in hot water to create herbal remedies for various ailments.
